bugs.description: While testing "Remove item works from cart workflow" on https://uat2.purelifedental.com/, the run failed because Step failed after 3 attempts: No executable UI action matched intent: "Remove item from cart". Additional signals: Iframe detected; target action may be inside nested browsing context.; Modal/dialog present; interactions may be blocked..

bugs.businessImpact: Checkout instability directly threatens conversion and revenue.

bugs.revenueImpact: Indirect impact possible depending on page traffic and funnel position.
